sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_dict JSON, value_col VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_dict (id, data_dict, value_col) VALUES (1, '{"key1": "value1", "key2": "value2"}', 'test value');
INSERT INTO test_dict (id, data_dict, value_col) VALUES (2, '{"key3": null, "key4": "value4"}', 'another test value');
SELECT dict_to_vector(data_dict) AS vector FROM test_dict WHERE isIRI(value_col);
SELECT id, dict_to_vector(data_dict) AS vector FROM test_dict WHERE isIRI(CAST(value_col AS IRI));
SELECT id, dict_to_vector(data_dict) AS vector FROM test_dict WHERE value_col IS NOT NULL AND isIRI(value_col);
SELECT id, AVG(COALESCE(LENGTH(value_col), 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY isIRI(value_col)) AS average_length FROM test_dict;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_data JSON NOT NULL, extra_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO complex_test (id, json_data, extra_value) VALUES (1, '{"keyA": 1, "keyB": 2.5}', 'valueA');
SELECT id, dict_to_vector(json_data) AS vector FROM complex_test WHERE isIRI(extra_value) AND extra_value != '';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_test WHERE isIRI(CAST(extract(json_data, '$.keyB') AS VARCHAR)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE reference_data (ref_id INT, ref_name VARCHAR(100));
SELECT c.id, dict_to_vector(data_dict) AS vector, r.ref_name FROM test_dict c JOIN reference_data r ON c.id = r.ref_id WHERE isIRI(r.ref_name);
SELECT CASE WHEN isIRI(value_col) THEN dict_to_vector(data_dict) ELSE NULL END AS vector_case FROM test_dict;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dict AS SELECT dict_to_vector(data_dict) AS temp_vector FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM temp_dict WHERE temp_vector IS NOT NULL;
